tracks.meaning: a state of equilibrium between debits and credits in an account, or the difference between them
to keep or put something in a stable position so it does not fall
a state of mental or emotional equilibrium and stability
the ability to maintain bodily equilibrium and coordination
a device or scale used to weigh or compare the weight of objects
a settlement or adjustment of accounts between parties
the distribution of weight or positioning to remain upright and stable
what remains or is left over after other things are accounted for
the poise and control of the body during movement or performance
the harmonious arrangement of visual elements in a composition
the state in which quantities of reactants and products reach a stable relationship
an equilibrium or equality in rights, obligations, or exchanges between parties
